ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the site name */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Full name of the site */,
  "north_south_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the north-south code */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes on accessing the site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* General notes about the site */,
  "parent_site_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the parent site (if applicable) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Detailed location description */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the site */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the site information was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the site entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the site entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_parent_site_abbr FOREIGN KEY ("parent_site_abbr") REFERENCES sites ("site_abbr"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES site_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_north_south_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("north_south_code_id") REFERENCES north_south_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the site type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the site type is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "north_south_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each north-south code */,
  "code_name" TEXT /* Name of the north-south code (e.g., N, S) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the north-south code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_relationships" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site relationship */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "parent_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent site (if applicable) */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the relationship is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_relationships_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_relationships_parent_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., conservationist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES conservation_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the site */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the change is significant */,
  "reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the change has been reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_history_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
